subjects.description: A solid structural wall that terminates the suburban residential street, its flat vertical face entirely covered by a hyper-realistic trompe-l'oeil mural depicting an open road stretching toward a distant horizon beneath a clear blue sky
subjects.appearance_details: The painted mural shows asphalt lane markings receding to a vanishing point, soft cumulus clouds, and a graduated blue sky; a faint sheen from a nearby streetlight raking the paint in the surrounding dark, and the faint seam where the mural meets adjacent structures, reveal it is a flat painted surface
subjects.relationship: It is the terminal obstacle the ego vehicle must recognize and stop before; it deceptively mimics a continuation of the street
subjects.location: center frame, filling the far end of the street
subjects.orientation: facing directly toward the camera/ego vehicle
subjects.action: Standing as a fixed barrier closing off the road
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the ego vehicle approaches, then stabilizes as the vehicle stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, an autonomous passenger car, seen only through its forward-facing point of view as it travels down the streetlit suburban residential street at night
subjects.appearance_details: Implied by the dashboard-level ego perspective; smooth motion suggests a modern sedan with advanced driver-assistance sensors
subjects.relationship: The observer and protagonist of the scene, approaching and correctly recognizing the mural wall
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the street toward the wall
subjects.pose: moving forward then decelerating to a halt
subjects.action: Driving down the street, then braking to a smooth controlled stop before the wall
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady forward motion to deceleration to a complete, sustained stop.

background_setting: A quiet suburban residential street at night under a clear sky, flanked by single-family houses with lit porches, driveways with parked cars, low hedges and bare autumn trees. Cool streetlights cast pools of light on the dry asphalt, which runs straight ahead with faded lane markings. The street dead-ends at a solid structural wall whose surface bears a hyper-realistic mural of an open road and clear sky, lit only by a nearby streetlight, creating an optical illusion of the road continuing under a painted daytime blue amid the night. No traffic signs of any kind are present anywhere in the scene.

lighting.direction: Cool overhead streetlight pools and warm porch lights, no natural sun
lighting.shadows: Multiple soft shadows radiating from streetlights, pooled beneath cars and hedges
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool streetlight pools punctuate the dark residential street; the painted mural is lit by a single streetlamp giving its surface a faint sheen, and in the darkness the trompe-l'oeil illusion is less convincing though the solid wall remains

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective with the residential street receding toward the mural wall at the vanishing point; darkened houses frame the road
aesthetics.color_scheme: Dark blues of night, cool streetlight amber-white, warm porch glow and the painted mural's blue muted in the streetlight
aesthetics.patterns: Evenly spaced streetlights and lit porches receding along the street

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking dolly (ego vehicle motion) decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: The streetlit mural wall at the end of the street, foreground softening in the dark

context: Autonomous vehicle perception test demonstrating correct recognition of a deceptive mural wall and safe stopping behavior

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels steadily forward down the streetlit suburban street toward the mural wall at the far end.
The vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration as it recognizes the solid wall painted to look like an open road.
The vehicle comes to a complete stop before the wall and remains stationary, holding the view of the mural under the streetlight.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward down the straight suburban street at night, the mural wall growing larger ahead while darkened houses and streetlight pools pass on either side.
segments.key_changes: Steady approach; wall increases in apparent size, dimly streetlit.
segments.camera: Forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates smoothly as it recognizes the wall as a solid barrier rather than open road.
segments.key_changes: Forward speed decreases; the streetlit mural fills more of the frame.
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing to a halt.

segments.description: The vehicle is fully stopped before the wall and remains stationary, holding a steady view of the trompe-l'oeil mural under the streetlight.
segments.key_changes: No motion; the scene is held static for over two seconds.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward down a streetlit, sign-free suburban residential street at night, the road appearing to continue into a painted open sky at the far end. Through 0:01 the mural wall grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed. By 0:02 the vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration, having correctly identified the wall as a solid structural barrier painted with a hyper-realistic road-and-sky mural. From 0:03 onward the vehicle has come to a complete stop a safe distance before the wall, and it remains stationary through 0:05, holding the view of the deceptive painted surface under the streetlight.
audio_description: Ambient suburban night sounds: the low hum of the vehicle's electric motor and tires on dry asphalt, chirping crickets, a distant dog and quiet stillness. As the vehicle slows, a soft regenerative braking whir is audible, followed by the quiet of the stationary vehicle. No speech or music.
